title: RickRoll Mod [Forge]
body:
# RickRoll Mod
This mod allows you to RickRoll your friends in Minecraft!

<details>
  
<summary>Features</summary>

- RickRoll Music Disc
- The music is ambient type, so if the player walks away from the jukebox, the music will continue to play until it ends.
- RickRoll Painting (64x64)
</details>

## How to Use?
- Use the Music Disc
- Type **/playsound rickrollmod:rickroll player <yourfriend>** in the chat.
### Music Disc Recipe

![Music Disc Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edf34cef8548c0e481cfddd448d79546f18e326c.png)

## [Fabric Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/rickroll-mod-fabric)
